creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, May 10, 2013 at 3:10 PM, Guido Falsi <madpilot@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi!
>
> I noticed that version 0.6.2 is now out.
>
> While working on this I also fixed a few more things. Attaching a patch with
> the following changes:
>
> - Update to 0.6.2
> - fixed master site (your patch still looked in 0.5 directory)
> - Use DATADIR macro
> - Remove share/applications directory if empty
>
> can you test and approve this? Thanks!

Hi submitted the patch for 0.6.2 a couple of days ago :)

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=178434

>
> --
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
